title: Vue test app for SDK capabilities check
excerpt:
I just started with the SDK and needed some testing app to play with the SDK options. 
So I created a test app based on Vue v3.0 to use as a Board Views or Item Views. (I know @amit.lzkpa made simple app, but he used Vue…

posts.author: kulaone (Daniel Gwerzman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I just started with the SDK and needed some testing app to play with the SDK options.
So I created a test app based on Vue v3.0 to use as a Board Views or Item Views. (I know @amit.lzkpa made simple app, but he used Vue 2.0)

Hopefully other people will benefit from it as much as I did.

Link: GitHub - kulaone/monday-vue

Screenshot 2022-08-23 at 17.00.441920×836 101 KB
